metadata.title: Dr. Edwin Alvarado — Cardiovascular Surgeon | Heredia
metadata.description: Specialist in Cardiovascular and General Surgery, trained in Madrid, Spain, with over 40 years of experience. Private practice in Heredia, Costa Rica.
metadata.ogTitle: Dr. Edwin Manuel Alvarado Arce | Cardiovascular & General Surgery — Heredia

cta.title: Ready to book an appointment?

consultorio.title: Private care backed by decades of experience

items.label: What is it?
items.body: A private cardiovascular and general surgery practice in Heredia, Costa Rica. Direct access to the specialist, no intermediaries, in a setting designed for the patient's comfort.

items.label: What do we offer?
items.body: Clinical consultation, evaluation, and specialized surgical opinion in cardiovascular and general surgery. Dr. Alvarado personally assesses each case and guides patients toward the most appropriate course of action.

items.label: How does it work?
items.body: Appointments are scheduled directly via WhatsApp or phone. No referral required. The consultation includes a full clinical evaluation and guidance on next steps.

items.label: Who can come?
items.body: Patients who need cardiovascular or surgical opinion — whether on their own initiative, referred by another physician, or following up after a previous procedure.

hero.eyebrow: Private Medical Practice · Heredia, Costa Rica
hero.title: Dr. Edwin Manuel Alvarado Arce
hero.subtitle: Trained at Hospital Ramón y Cajal in Madrid. Over 40 years of experience in cardiovascular and general surgery in Costa Rica.

sobre.title: A life dedicated to the heart
sobre.body:
Dr. Edwin Manuel Alvarado Arce is a surgeon specializing in Cardiovascular Surgery and General Surgery, with over four decades of practice in Costa Rica. He completed his specialty training at Hospital Ramón y Cajal and the University of Alcalá de Henares in Madrid, Spain.

He served as Head of the Cardiovascular and Thoracic Surgery Department at Hospital México (CCSS), and has trained generations of physicians as a professor at the University of Costa Rica (UCR) and the University of Medical Sciences (UCIMED).

His private practice in Heredia combines the expertise of a high-level institutional and international career with the personalized attention each patient deserves.
